meaning: n.[天](天球的)回归线,热带adj.热带的
examples: For centuries he braved arctic cold, tropic heat and inhuman privations to wrest gold from the earth.
According to scientific results, on Winter solstice, a right angle is formed by the sun and the tropic of carpricorn.
The star of "Tropic Thunder" is nominated for his first Oscar in 16 years.
Some testing still goes on at what is now known as the Tropic Test Centre.
